title: Save/Delete buttons are 32dp icon-only with no text labels
description: The Save (green checkmark) and Delete (red trash) buttons in AlarmEditScreen are only 32dp circles with no text. On a watch screen, this is hard to tap and the meaning of abstract icons may not be clear to all users.

PM.notes: Should-fix. Accessibility concern for all users.

Dev Lead.notes: Increase button size to 40dp, <5 lines change.
